title: Amtech - Car Detailing Brush Set for Cleaning Dust, Dirt, and More, Suitable for Wet and Dry Use, Non-Scratching Soft Nylon Bristles, Can be Used with Cleaning Products or Waxes (5pc)
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: IDEAL PRODUCT: Effortlessly remove dirt and debris from your car's interior with this multi-function brush set.
VERSATILE CLEANING: Five different brush sizes to suit various cleaning needs, reaching even the tightest spaces.
GENTLE & SAFE: Soft bristles ensure effective cleaning without scratching car surfaces, wheels, or leather seat covers.
WET & DRY USE: Suitable for both wet and dry cleaning, making it convenient for different cleaning situations.
THOROUGH CLEANING: Pick up dust, pollen, and crumbs in one swipe, leaving your car clean and tidy from the inside out.
description: Keep your car spotless with the 5-piece car detailing brush set. This versatile and multi-function brush set is designed to eliminate dust, crumbs, and debris from every nook and cranny of your vehicle. The soft bristles ensure a gentle touch while effectively removing dirt from tight spaces without scratching surfaces. The set includes brushes of various sizes to tackle any cleaning task, making it easy to reach and clean narrow areas. Whether you need to tidy up your wheels, air vents, trim, seat crevices, or emblems, this brush set is the perfect companion for achieving a thorough and meticulous car cleaning.
